personality: 1 iOS-Native structure with 6 Glass / Luxe surfaces
personality_one_liner: A sleek, dark-first fitness tracker that feels like a premium iOS native experience—pairing Apple Health's clarity with deep charcoal surfaces, glowing emerald accents, and elegant glassmorphism.

spacing.rule: Generous padding around content, clear grouping. Use bottom safe area for floating CTAs.

do's: Use frosted glass on Bottom Tabs, Sticky Headers over scrolling content, Bottom Sheet headers, and floating CTA container bottoms.
Apply translucent tinted base underneath the foreground content for readability (≥75% of surface opacity in dark mode).
dont's: Never blur body text regions, form fields, or dense list items.
Do not use transparent bars where scrolling content underneath competes with button labels.

screens.name: Splash
screens.purpose: Brand introduction with logo animation and immersive dark emerald gradient.
screens.layout: Full bleed layout using the splash_bg abstract emerald gradient image with an overlaying linear-gradient (transparent to surface). Centered logo and minimal text.

screens.name: Onboarding
screens.purpose: Educate users about AI Food Recognition, Macros, AI Coach, and Travel Mode.
screens.layout: Full-bleed immersive scenes per step. Layer 0: Image (onboard_scan, onboard_macros, etc). Layer 1: Vertical gradient scrim (transparent -> 80% surface at bottom). Layer 2: Text + Paging dots + Sticky 'Continue' CTA button pinned at the bottom.

screens.name: Auth
screens.purpose: Allow user login/registration or skipping to dashboard.
screens.layout: Centered form elements with large tap targets. Clean inputs (label above, surfaceTertiary bg). Social buttons in pills. 'Continue as Guest' clearly visible.

screens.name: Home Dashboard
screens.purpose: Command center for daily health: calories, macros, quick actions, and meals.

states.loading: Skeleton UI for rings and cards

screens.layout: Header: Title with profile avatar (home_header_avatar). Top Section: Large circular progress ring for Calories, with 3 nested rings (Protein/Carbs/Fat) Apple Health style. Middle Section: Horizontal scroll of glass pill 'Quick Actions' (Scan, Water, Workout). Bottom Section: 'Recent Meals' vertical list. Ensure safe area at bottom for Tab Bar.

screens.name: AI Food Scanner
screens.purpose: Frictionless AI camera for meal logging.
screens.layout: Full-screen camera view. Top bar: Flash & Gallery icons. Bottom area: Large floating capture button on a translucent glass panel. After capture: Bottom Sheet slides up showing 'Recognition Result' chips (e.g., 'Salmon', 'Avocado'), macros, and a primary Save button.

screens.name: Macro Tracker
screens.purpose: Detailed daily macro progress and food logs.
screens.layout: Top: Animated linear progress bars for Protein, Carbs, Fat, Fiber, Water. Bottom: Segmented list of consumed items grouped by meal type.

screens.name: AI Diet Assistant Chat
screens.purpose: Conversational interface with AI Coach for tailored advice.
screens.layout: Standard chat layout. AI messages on left (ai_coach_avatar), User right. Embed custom 'Macro Plan Cards' directly inside the chat flow instead of just plain text. Input field pinned to bottom with keyboard avoiding view.

screens.name: Meal Planner
screens.purpose: Browse recommended meals and track them.
screens.layout: Top: Scrollable segmented control (Breakfast, Lunch, Snacks, Dinner). Body: 2-column grid or single-column wide cards showing food imagery (meal_breakfast, etc) + scrim + title/macros overlaid at bottom.

screens.name: Travel Mode
screens.purpose: Pause strict diet rules and focus on maintenance/recovery.
screens.layout: Hero banner indicating 'Travel Mode' active. Large toggle switch. Cards explaining adjusted surplus calories and recovery tracking instead of rigid deficit.

screens.name: Analytics
screens.layout: Weekly bar charts (Calories, Protein) using brandPrimary and brandSecondary colors. Streak indicators in rounded surfaceSecondary cards. Horizontal scroll for different weeks.

screens.name: Profile & Settings
screens.purpose: Manage account, goals, and app preferences.
screens.layout: Header: Large Avatar + Name. Body: List rows for settings. Every row uses a 'brandTertiary' tinted rounded square containing the row icon, title, and chevron right.

splash_bg.alt: abstract dark green emerald gradient cinematic background

onboard_macros.alt: data tracking rings abstract minimal dark green

ai_coach_avatar.alt: calm glowing ai avatar minimal gradient

meal_breakfast.alt: healthy avocado toast breakfast overhead shot

meal_lunch.alt: grilled salmon salad lunch healthy meal

meal_dinner.alt: steak sweet potato healthy dinner bowl

instructions_to_main_agent: Build 'FitMate' using a dark-first iOS-native Glass Luxe theme. Apply the `surface` (#0F1115) to root backgrounds and `surfaceSecondary` to cards.
Implement the circular progress rings for macros on the Home screen. Consider `react-native-svg` to draw nested Apple Health style rings (Calories, Protein, Carbs, Fat).
Ensure 'Continue as Guest' navigates correctly to the bottom-tabs dashboard.
Onboarding and Hero cards MUST use the mandatory gradient-to-dark scrim pattern (transparent to >=70% surfaceInverse vertically) behind text overlaid on imagery.
Use glassmorphism (via expo-blur) heavily for Bottom Tabs, the AI Camera bottom controls, and the Sticky primary CTA across scrolling views.
Include 'Profile' via header avatar navigation on the Home Dashboard as requested by user.
For the AI Chat, do not use basic text bubbles for complex plans—render a custom 'Macro Plan Card' natively inside the chat flow.
Use Phosphor or Ionicons consistently. Ensure all icons are either filled or outlined, keeping weight unified across the app.
Implement the 'Travel Mode' screen as a distinct feature with a beautiful hero banner and clear toggle settings for surplus calories.
Use the exact requested theme palette: Emerald Green primary, Blue secondary, Success Green, Warning Orange, Error Red. Do not deviate.
